name: agentfactory
description: Workspace for building and testing pi agents.

scripts.pi: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && cd pi-sandbox && exec pi --no-context-files --provider openrouter "$@"' --
scripts.agent-maker: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec scripts/task-runner/agent-maker.sh "$@"' --
scripts.agent-maker:i: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec scripts/task-runner/agent-maker.sh --interactive "$@"' --
scripts.agent-composer: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec scripts/agent-composer.sh "$@"' --
scripts.agent-composer:i: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec scripts/agent-composer.sh -i "$@"' --
scripts.agent: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec scripts/run-agent.sh "$@"' --
scripts.agent:i: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec scripts/run-agent.sh -i "$@"' --
scripts.reverse-pipeline: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec tsx scripts/reverse-pipeline/index.ts "$@"' --
